title: Build memory projection from source envelopes
requirements: Add service to upsert MemorySourceObject and MemorySearchDocument from SourceObjectEnvelope.
Index envelope text into FTS5 and vector backend according to existing index profiles.
Handle operation=delete through tombstone/deactivation of search documents and index rows.
Apply secret scan before indexing regardless of privacy profile.
Apply PII controls only when privacy profile enables them.
Do not create PII audit when privacy profile is pii_off.
Before returning source_data, enforce adapter_check through the registered source adapter when configured.
If adapter_check adapter is missing, deny result and record safe audit trace.
